title: California DDS Pay-Scale Research Notes (CalCareers; base DEA + DEA III Authoritative)
description: Narrative research notes for California DDS pay: administering agency (CDSS Disability Determination Service Division), the Disability Evaluation Analyst (DEA) examiner series with current monthly ranges verified from the official CalCareers classification details (base DEA class 5365 $3,861-$6,276/mo; DEA III class 5367 $6,031-$7,547/mo), the DEA II/supervisor gaps and their blockers (CalHR hrnet crossref JS-gated; alpha pay-scale PDF salary columns dropped), and SEIU Local 1000 BU 4 (Office and Allied) 2024-2027 CBA context. Companion to CA/scheduled-rates.json.

source.publisher: California Department of Human Resources (CalHR) / CalCareers; CA Dept of Social Services (CDSS) Disability Determination Service Division
source.title: CA DDS salary research notes (CalCareers DEA classification details, retrieved 2026-06-02)

notes: Authoritative for base Disability Evaluation Analyst (class 5365, $3,861-$6,276/mo) and Disability Evaluation Analyst III (class 5367, $6,031-$7,547/mo), from the official CalCareers classification details. PARTIAL: DEA II (journey) current standalone range not retrieved (CalHR hrnet class-spec crossref JS-gated, empty) and the supervisor is the generic Staff Services Manager I (Specialist) class (figure not filled — alpha pay-scale PDF salary columns dropped in extraction). SEIU Local 1000 BU 4 (Office and Allied) 2024-2027.
